SETUP GOOGLE DRIVE AUTO UPLOAD
📋 Panduan Lengkap Setup Google Drive untuk Backup Otomatis
Dengan fitur ini, backup database akan otomatis diupload ke Google Drive setelah dibuat.

🔧 STEP 1: Buat Service Account di Google Cloud
1.1 Buka Google Cloud Console
https://console.cloud.google.com
1.2 Buat Project Baru (atau gunakan yang ada)

Klik Select a project di navbar atas
Klik NEW PROJECT
Nama project: Fixpoint Backup (bebas)
Klik CREATE

1.3 Enable Google Drive API

Di sidebar, klik APIs & Services > Library
Search: Google Drive API
Klik Google Drive API
Klik ENABLE

1.4 Buat Service Account

Di sidebar, klik APIs & Services > Credentials
Klik + CREATE CREDENTIALS
Pilih Service Account
Isi:

Service account name: backup-uploader
Service account ID: backup-uploader (auto-generated)


Klik CREATE AND CONTINUE
Role: Pilih Basic > Editor (atau skip)
Klik DONE

1.5 Download Credentials JSON

Di halaman Credentials, cari service account yang baru dibuat
Klik pada service account name
Tab KEYS
Klik ADD KEY > Create new key
Pilih JSON
Klik CREATE
File JSON akan terdownload otomatis

1.6 Copy Email Service Account
Di halaman service account details, copy email address:
backup-uploader@fixpoint-backup.iam.gserviceaccount.com
SIMPAN EMAIL INI! Akan digunakan di langkah berikutnya.

📁 STEP 2: Setup Folder Google Drive
2.1 Buat Folder di Google Drive

Buka Google Drive
Klik + New > Folder
Nama folder: Backup Database Fixpoint
Klik CREATE

2.2 Share Folder dengan Service Account

Klik kanan pada folder
Pilih Share
Paste email service account yang dicopy tadi
Set permission: Editor
UNCHECK "Notify people"
Klik Share

2.3 Copy Folder ID

Buka folder yang baru dibuat
Lihat URL di browser:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1A2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9I0J
                                         ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
                                         INI FOLDER ID NYA

COPY FOLDER ID (bagian setelah /folders/)

Contoh: 1A2B3C4D5E6F7G8H9I0J

💻 STEP 3: Setup di Server
3.1 Upload Credentials File

Rename file JSON yang didownload menjadi: gdrive-credentials.json
Upload ke root folder aplikasi fixpoint (sama level dengan backup_database.php)
Set permission:

bashchmod 600 gdrive-credentials.json
3.2 Upload Helper File

Upload file gdrive_helper.php ke root folder
Set permission:

bashchmod 644 gdrive_helper.php
3.3 Install Google API Client
Di server, jalankan:
bashcd /path/to/fixpoint
composer require google/apiclient:"^2.0"
Atau jika tidak ada composer, download manual:
bashwget https://github.com/googleapis/google-api-php-client/archive/refs/tags/v2.15.0.zip
unzip v2.15.0.zip
mv google-api-php-client-2.15.0 vendor/google

⚙️ STEP 4: Konfigurasi di Aplikasi Fixpoint
4.1 Login ke Fixpoint

Login sebagai admin
Buka menu Backup Database

4.2 Klik Tombol Pengaturan (pada card Backup Otomatis)
4.3 Aktifkan Google Drive Upload

Scroll ke bawah sampai section "Upload Otomatis ke Google Drive"
Toggle ON: "Auto Upload ke GDrive"
Paste Folder ID yang sudah dicopy ke field "Folder ID Google Drive"
Klik Simpan Pengaturan


✅ STEP 5: Test Upload
5.1 Test Manual via Browser
Buka URL:
https://yourdomain.com/cron_backup.php
5.2 Cek Log
bashcat backups/backup_log.txt
Harus ada log seperti:
[2026-02-05 08:00:00] Mengupload ke Google Drive...
[2026-02-05 08:00:15] Upload ke Google Drive berhasil! File ID: xxxxx
5.3 Cek Google Drive

Buka folder di Google Drive
Seharusnya ada file backup baru: auto_backup_fixpoint_system_2026-02-05_08-00-00.sql


🔍 TROUBLESHOOTING
Error: "Credentials file not found"
Solusi:

Pastikan file gdrive-credentials.json ada di root folder
Cek nama file (huruf kecil semua)
Cek permission: chmod 600 gdrive-credentials.json

Error: "Google API Client not installed"
Solusi:
bashcd /path/to/fixpoint
composer require google/apiclient:"^2.0"
Atau download manual dan letakkan di folder vendor/
Error: "The caller does not have permission"
Solusi:

Pastikan folder sudah di-share dengan email service account
Set permission Editor (bukan Viewer)
Pastikan Folder ID benar

Upload gagal tapi tidak ada error
Solusi:

Cek log: cat backups/backup_log.txt
Cek apakah gdrive_helper.php ada
Test credentials:

bashphp -r "require 'gdrive_helper.php'; $g = new GoogleDriveBackup(); echo 'OK';"
File tidak muncul di Google Drive
Solusi:

Cek quota Google Drive (15 GB free)
Refresh folder Google Drive
Cek folder ID apakah benar
Lihat di "Shared with me" jika folder tidak muncul


📊 MONITORING
Cek Status Upload di Log
bashtail -f backups/backup_log.txt
Cek File di Google Drive
Via web: https://drive.google.com
Cek Quota Google Drive

Buka Google Drive
Klik Storage di sidebar kiri
Lihat penggunaan storage


🔒 KEAMANAN
Best Practices:

✅ Simpan credentials.json aman

bash   chmod 600 gdrive-credentials.json

✅ Jangan commit credentials ke Git
Tambahkan di .gitignore:

   gdrive-credentials.json

✅ Rotate Service Account Key

Setiap 90 hari
Generate key baru
Delete key lama


✅ Monitor Aktivitas

Cek Google Cloud Console > Activity
Alert jika ada aktivitas mencurigakan


✅ Batasi Permission

Service account hanya akses 1 folder
Jangan beri akses ke entire Drive




💰 BIAYA
Google Drive Free Tier:

15 GB storage gratis
Shared dengan Gmail & Google Photos

Estimasi Penggunaan:

Backup database (misal 500 KB)
Backup daily = 500 KB x 30 hari = 15 MB/bulan
Sangat hemat! Cukup dengan free tier

Jika Perlu Lebih:

Google One: 100 GB = Rp 26,900/bulan
Google Workspace: Storage unlimited


🎯 TIPS & TRICKS
1. Compress Backup Sebelum Upload
Edit cron_backup.php, tambahkan sebelum upload:
php// Compress file
$zip = new ZipArchive();
$zip_file = $filepath . '.zip';
$zip->open($zip_file, ZipArchive::CREATE);
$zip->addFile($filepath, basename($filepath));
$zip->close();

// Upload zip instead
uploadToGoogleDrive($zip_file, $folder_id);
2. Organize by Date
Buat subfolder per bulan di Google Drive:
Backup Database/
  └── 2026/
      └── 02-February/
          └── auto_backup_...sql
3. Email Notification
Tambahkan setelah upload sukses:
phpif ($gdrive_result['success']) {
    mail('admin@domain.com', 
         'Backup Success', 
         'Backup uploaded to Google Drive: ' . $gdrive_result['web_link']);
}

📞 SUPPORT
Jika masih ada masalah:

Cek dokumentasi Google: https://developers.google.com/drive
Lihat error log: backups/backup_log.txt
Test manual: buka cron_backup.php di browser


Selamat! Backup otomatis Anda sekarang tersimpan aman di Google Drive! 🎉
Database akan di-backup dan diupload otomatis setiap hari sesuai jadwal yang Anda tentukan.
